children.heading: Authority of the Attorney General
children.label: a Authority of the Attorney General

children.text: reduce the backlog in the processing of immigration benefit applications, with the objective of the total elimination of the backlog 1 year after ;November 25, 2002
make such other improvements in the processing of immigration benefit applications as may be necessary to ensure that a backlog does not develop after such date; and
make such improvements in infrastructure as may be necessary to effectively provide immigration services.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Department of Justice from time to time such sums as may be necessary for the Attorney General to carry out subsection (a).

children.heading: Designation of account in treasury
children.label: 2 Designation of account in treasury
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to paragraph (1) may be referred to as the “Immigration Services and Infrastructure Improvements Account”.

children.heading: Availability of funds
children.label: 3 Availability of funds
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to paragraph (1) are authorized to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Limitation on expenditures
children.label: 4 Limitation on expenditures
children.text: None of the funds appropriated pursuant to paragraph (1) may be expended until the report described in has been submitted to Congress.section 1574(a) of this title
